prop1.title: Modern Studio in Pipera
prop1.subtitle: Wifi included • Near Metro
prop1.description: Enjoy a bright, fully furnished private studio in Pipera. You'll have complete privacy with your own kitchen and bathroom. The apartment features a spacious living area and a beautiful view of the city.

reviews.name: Andrei T.
reviews.text: Perfect studio for a single professional.

reviews.name: Elena P.
reviews.text: Very clean and near the metro station. Highly recommended!

prop3.title: 3-Bed Apt near Poli
prop3.subtitle: Regie area • 3 Rooms
prop3.description: Awesome 3-bedroom apartment located right next to the university. Great community vibe, fast internet, and massive kitchen for cooking with roommates.

reviews.name: Mihai C.
reviews.text: Great place to study and live!

prop5.title: Luxury Penthouse in Herastrau
prop5.subtitle: Lake View • 4 Rooms
prop5.description: Live in luxury in this stunning Herastrau penthouse. Featuring panoramic lake views, state-of-the-art appliances, underfloor heating, and 24/7 security. Perfect for executives.

reviews.name: Alex V.
reviews.text: Absolutely stunning. Best apartment in Bucharest.

prop8.title: Coliving Space in Old Town
prop8.subtitle: Historic Center • 6 Beds
prop8.description: Join our vibrant coliving community right in the heart of Old Town! Ideal for digital nomads and young professionals. Weekly community events and super-fast internet.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Amazing community! Made so many friends here.
